strings.panel.p1.narration.1.html: Be amazed as Radd demonstrates his special powers.
strings.panel.p2.bubble.center.html: Like most kids, I can throw Radd Beams to zap my uncool enemies.
strings.panel.p3.bubble.center.html: However, when the player holds down the attack button, I charge up my famous Mega Radd.
strings.panel.p4.bubble.center.html: If the user holds it down for ten seconds, I can reach a max attack of 255!
strings.panel.p5.bubble.center.html: Hey, do I have to explain everything?
